Name: ZESCO Kariba North Bank Extension – 360 MW Hydro Generation Asset Token
Description: Tokenised hydroelectric generation asset representing the 360 MW Kariba North Bank Power Extension (Units 5 and 6) on the Zambezi River. Commissioned 2019 with 50-year concession. ERB generation licence ZGL-0034. Asset backed by ZESCO balance sheet and GRZ sovereign guarantee.

Name: ZESCO Kafue Gorge Lower – 750 MW Hydro Generation Asset Token
Description: Tokenised generation asset for the 750 MW Kafue Gorge Lower Hydropower Plant, Zambia's largest single power project. Developed under a JV with China's SINOHYDRO and CNMC. ERB licence ZGL-0089. Value reflects total installed capacity at $1.2 billion project cost.

Name: ZESCO Victoria Falls Power Station – 108 MW Historic Generation Asset
Description: Tokenised generation asset for the Victoria Falls Power Station, operated since 1938, recently refurbished to 108 MW capacity. Heritage infrastructure asset on the Zambezi River shared with Zimbabwe Power Company (ZPC). ERB licence ZGL-0001. Represents Zambia's oldest hydropower installation.

Name: ZESCO Itezhi-Tezhi Power Station – 120 MW Kafue Basin Hydro Asset
Description: Tokenised generation asset for the 120 MW Itezhi-Tezhi Power Station on the Kafue River, jointly operated with Itezhi-Tezhi Power Corporation (ITPC). ERB licence ZGL-0054. Asset value reflects 40-year remaining concession and Kafue Flats water rights.

Name: ZESCO Lusaka South Solar Array – 60 MW Grid-Connected Solar PV Asset
Description: Tokenised solar PV generation asset: 60 MW ground-mounted photovoltaic array at Lusaka South Multi-Facility Economic Zone. Commissioned December 2024. Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with ZESCO at ZMW 0.42/kWh for 25 years. ERB licence ZGL-0112. Part of ZESCO's renewable diversification programme.

Name: ZESCO Infrastructure Bond 2022A – Series 1 (ZMW 2.5 billion)
Description: 10-year fixed-rate infrastructure bond issued by ZESCO on the Lusaka Securities Exchange (LuSE). Coupon 14.5% p.a. Backed by ZESCO transmission and distribution assets. Rating: Fitch BB- (Zambia sovereign ceiling). GRZ full step-in guarantee. SECZ prospectus approval SEC/ZB/2022/0034. Proceeds finance grid expansion across Northern and Luapula provinces.

Name: ZESCO Infrastructure Bond 2023A – Series 2 (ZMW 1.8 billion)
Description: 7-year fixed-rate bond, Coupon 15.0% p.a. LuSE-listed. Proceeds used for Kafue Gorge Lower power evacuation infrastructure (400kV transmission line, Kafue North-Lusaka). SECZ prospectus SEC/ZB/2023/0018. GRZ step-in guarantee and AfDB partial risk guarantee (PRG) attached.

Name: ZESCO Infrastructure Bond 2024A – Series 3 (ZMW 3.2 billion)
Description: 12-year infrastructure bond, Coupon 16.25% p.a. LuSE-listed. Largest single ZESCO bond issuance to date. Proceeds finance Copperbelt grid reinforcement, Ndola-Kitwe-Chingola 330kV upgrade, and 400 km rural Last Mile Electrification. SECZ ref SEC/ZB/2024/0041.

Name: ZESCO Green Transition Bond 2023 (ZMW 950 million) – CBI Certified
Description: 5-year green bond certified by the Climate Bonds Initiative (CBI) under the Climate Bonds Standard v4.0 – Renewable Energy category. Coupon 13.75% p.a. Proceeds exclusively finance solar and small hydro micro-grids for 180,000 rural households. LuSE-listed. ERB compliance confirmed. SECZ ref SEC/ZGB/2023/0007.

Name: ZESCO Rural Electrification Bond 2025 (ZMW 620 million)
Description: 8-year social development bond for the Rural Electrification Authority (REA) Last Mile Electrification Programme Phase III. Target: 250,000 connections in Eastern, Northern and Luapula provinces. Coupon 14.0% p.a. IDA/World Bank partial credit guarantee attached. SECZ pending approval SEC/ZSB/2025/0003.

Name: ZESCO Kafue Gorge Lower Revenue Bond – Tranche A (ZMW 1.2 billion)
Description: Revenue bond backed by projected annual generation revenues from Kafue Gorge Lower (750 MW, 4,000 GWh/yr). Revenues ring-fenced in dedicated project account under ZESCO-MOF Escrow Agreement KGL-ESC-2024. Tranche A covers 2025–2029 revenue stream. Debt-service coverage ratio: 1.4×. SECZ ref SEC/ZRB/2024/0012.
LockedReason: Collateral for AfDB USD 150M infrastructure loan facility KGL-LF-2024

Name: ZESCO Kariba Revenue Bond – Tranche A (ZMW 950 million)
Description: Revenue bond collateralised against Kariba North Bank Extension and Kafue Gorge Upper combined generation revenues (470 MW effective capacity). Revenue stream structured under ZESCO-BOZ escrow trust. Annual revenue base: ZMW 1.6 billion. DSCR: 1.55×. SECZ ref SEC/ZRB/2023/0028.

Name: ZESCO Solar IPP Revenue Bond – Lusaka 60 MW (ZMW 420 million)
Description: Revenue bond backed by 25-year PPA cash flows from the Lusaka South 60 MW solar array. Fixed PPA tariff: ZMW 0.42/kWh guarantees annual revenue of ~ZMW 110M. Structure mirrors World Bank IBRD energy PRG framework. SECZ ref SEC/ZRB/2025/0004. ERB PPA registration EPR-0234.

Name: ZESCO Northern Corridor Grid Interconnection Revenue Bond (ZMW 680 million)
Description: Revenue bond backed by cross-border electricity trading revenues on the Zambia–Tanzania 220kV SAPP interconnector. Annual trading revenues from TANESCO off-take agreement: ~ZMW 180M/yr. Proceeds fund 180 km transmission line upgrade, Nakonde to Tunduma. SAPP registry ref SAPP/ZM-TZ/2024/IRB-001.

Name: Kariba North Bank Extension – 60-Year Hydro Generation Concession Right
Description: Tokenised concession right for the operation and maintenance of Kariba North Bank Extension (360 MW) for a 60-year term from 2019 to 2079. Concession granted by Government of Zambia (GRZ) under the Electricity Act No. 11 of 2019. ERB licence ZGL-0034. Includes exclusive water use rights over Zambezi River stretch in Siavonga District.

Name: Kafue Gorge Lower – 50-Year Hydro Generation Concession Right
Description: Tokenised concession right for Kafue Gorge Lower Power Plant (750 MW) operation from 2022 to 2072. Concession agreement KGL-CA-2022 between GRZ and ZESCO/SINOHYDRO JV. Includes exclusive diversion rights for Kafue River waters between Gorge Upper tailrace and Kafue Lower reservoir. ERB licence ZGL-0089.

Name: Zambia–Zimbabwe SAPP Interconnector Transmission Right (350 MW capacity)
Description: Tokenised cross-border transmission concession right on the 330kV Zambia–Zimbabwe SAPP interconnector (Victoria Falls–Hwange corridor). Capacity: 350 MW import/export. Bilateral agreement between ZESCO and Zimbabwe Power Company (ZPC) under SAPP ILA. Term: 2020–2045. Revenue from SAPP trading and ZPC off-take: ~ZMW 240M/yr.
LockedReason: Under review: ZESCO-ZETDC bilateral renegotiation of capacity allocation and SAPP cross-border tariff revision 2025

Name: Zambia–Tanzania SAPP Interconnector Transmission Right (200 MW capacity)
Description: Tokenised transmission concession right on the 220kV Zambia–Tanzania Northern Corridor interconnector (Nakonde–Tunduma). Capacity: 200 MW. Agreement between ZESCO and TANESCO under SAPP ILA and East Africa Power Pool (EAPP) protocol. Remaining term: 2024–2044. TANESCO off-take agreement ref TANESCO-ZM-2024.

Name: ZESCO Equity Token – GRZ/IDC 100% Government Holding
Description: Tokenised equity representing the Government of Zambia's 100% ownership of ZESCO through the Industrial Development Corporation (IDC). Represents ZESCO's total net asset value including generation, transmission and distribution assets. ZESCO balance sheet Q4 2024: total assets ZMW 85B. IDC portfolio ref IDC-ZESCO-2024.

Name: ZESCO Kafue Gorge Lower JV Equity Token (50% stake, USD 600M valuation)
Description: Tokenised equity representing ZESCO's 50% stake in the Kafue Gorge Lower Power Corporation (KGLPC) JV with SINOHYDRO Corporation and China Non-Ferrous Metal Mining (CNMC). JV equity valuation based on DCF model at 12% WACC over 50-year concession period. Dividend policy: 30% of annual distributable profits from Year 5.

Name: ZESCO Lusaka Solar IPP JV Equity Token (49% stake)
Description: Tokenised equity representing ZESCO's 49% strategic stake in the Lusaka South Solar IPP Joint Venture Company (LSSIPV) with Scatec ASA (Norway, 51%). JV operates 60 MW solar PV under 25-year BOOT arrangement. ZESCO equity contribution: ZMW 850M in land rights, grid connection and step-in guarantee.

Name: Lusaka Solar Park PPP Token – 100 MW BOOT (25-year, ZMW 2.6 billion)
Description: PPP token for the 100 MW Lusaka Solar Park BOOT concession. Private partner: Scatec ASA (Norway). GRZ-approved under the PPP Act No. 14 of 2009. ZPPA procurement ref ZPPA/PPP/ZESCO/2024/001. ZESCO off-takes 100% output under PPA at ZMW 0.41/kWh. Financial close achieved Q1 2025. ERB generation licence pending.

Name: Ndola Gas-to-Power PPP Token – 50 MW BOOT (20-year, ZMW 1.3 billion)
Description: PPP token for the 50 MW Ndola Gas-to-Power BOOT project converting piped natural gas from Tanzania to electricity for Copperbelt industries. Private partner consortium: Globeleq Africa and First Quantum Minerals (FQM). ZPPA approval ZPPA/PPP/ZESCO/2024/003. ZESCO PPA and FQM industrial off-take agreement (40 MW). ERB regulatory process ongoing.

Name: Eastern Province Rural Electrification PPP Token (ZMW 780 million)
Description: PPP token for the Rural Electrification Authority–ZESCO Eastern Province Solar Mini-Grid Programme. 120 solar mini-grids serving 80,000 households in 12 districts (Chipata, Lundazi, Petauke, Katete, Chadiza, Nyimba, Sinda, Mambwe, Vubwi, Chama, Nawngwa, Mwami). Private operator: Zambia–Energy–Access (ZEA) Ltd. REA grant: ZMW 320M. USAID/USADF co-funding.

Name: Lusaka Metro Smart Meter Rollout PPP Token (ZMW 950 million)
Description: PPP token for the Lusaka Metropolitan Smart Prepaid Meter Replacement Programme covering 480,000 residential and commercial customers. Technology partner: Schneider Electric SE (France). Programme targets non-technical loss reduction from 22% to 8%. ZESCO capital contribution: metering infrastructure and grid SCADA. Private partner finances AMI backbone. ZPPA ref ZPPA/PPP/ZESCO/2025/002.
